Random Information

Angled Grip= Vertical Recoil reduction
Vertical Fore grip= Bit of Both Recoil Reduction
Disconnections should be fixed, if you get them, go to the forums and post it
Ranked system is ELO based
First 10 minutes are meant to be looting based until you get to the blue zone
Cool mods may be added to the game if good
E sports will take some time but they want to make it grow organically, main problem is how a battleroyale scene would work in real life scenario
Seasonal Leader boards with ranks
Rewards for ranks are being thought about
Community made skins may be possible but there are more important matters and will take some time
Patch will be sent out every month
Putting all resources into optimization and stability
35 people working on PUBG, 10+ programmers
Realistic elements are supposed to be focused on Gun play and such, fall damage is like this on purpose
Probable full reset on all stats on full release
3rd person shooting is intentionally less accurate than 1st person shooting
Forums are the best way to reach out to devs for suggestions and report bugs
Bans(justice) will be distributed to the cheats on the form of Waves, which is believed to be the most efficient way of doing so
Crate prices are intentionally increasing to keep the economy stable, items will be sellable on the steam market and the in-game crate prices reset every week
Mods will be working on dedicated servers with private servers. more info later on, not entirely decided

Upcoming Weeks Stuff

Durability changes will be coming in the next weeks
Grenades are being worked on, clunkyness is gonna be gone
Sprinting while crouching will be fixed, not intentionally
Word will be out about custom game servers etc on the upcoming weeks
Squad Map Markers will be added
Friends list on steam is being looked on
Upcoming Months Stuff

Vault Mechanic, Climb and such will be coming in the few months, Jumping will be entirely removed when it is introduced, which is expected to take 2 months(end of May)
Flash Hider will be useful since they will add some more light on gunshots
AUS Servers are coming and being set-up, next week for announcements
FOVs will come later on
Streamer Features will be coming
Grass are being worked on to make no difference in game play
Server stability will be improved
Positional Audio improvements over months
Server clunkyness is being worked on hard, expect a fix in the upcoming weeks/months
Foliage distribution is being worked on
footsteps on crouching may be a bug and fix is inc in the upcoming months
Making flashes and stun grenades are being talked about internally
Plans on more death screen stats
Physics and vehicles will be worked on
Full controller support will be implemented going forward
Play again button is being talked about after death
Bullet drop will be worked on. Zeroing is kind of a problem currently
No rejoin function on crashes etc. Rather get rid of the crashed altogether
Building Window opacity and stuff will be tweaked in the upcoming month
UI Improvements will happen over time, it is still a work in progress. Absolute No Stuff

No helicopters

Holding multiple armor and helmet will not be possible.

No ETA Stuff

Unranked servers will be available later on
Rangefinders / Binoculars will be added
Ranked competitive games
Battleroyale crate will be coming with references to the movie
Shooting Range will be added to practice weapons and such
Steam marketplace integration
Crate system, no monetization until after EA is complete
Weapon Skins will be coming - Skins are wanted to be not a jokey but serious and realistic
Second options with scopes, ACOG with red dot and such
Togleable ADS will be coming, currently Q&E buttons.
Snow is wanted but performance heavy, being hold on
Steam achievements are gonna be there
Revive clock should stop when someone starts to revive you, it's a bug that it continues to clock down right now
New handguns will be coming
Hardcore 1st Person only modes and no crosshair on TPS only modes
No word on next map, PU Said: "ruins the surprise, right?"
Destructible builds are in their radar but stability comes first
Weapon leveling system and such are being worked on but will need some time, leveling will unlock new reload styles and such which wont effect the gameplay
Plans for servers all over the world
FOV Sliders will be available in the future, FOV adjustments done by the people on their own will not be punished
Medkits and boosters will available to be used in a moving car. Eventually
New set of weapons, no word on those yet
After EA Release Stuff

Micro transactions will be in-game after EA release, like CS-GO keys and cases
Console version will be worked on after PC version is done
